mapper.select:
SELECT w.id, w.request_no, TO_CHAR(w.request_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS request_date, w.order_no, w.customer_nm, w.supplier_nm, w.site_nm, w.work_category, w.approval_status, w.memo, w.remarks, w.product_category, w.material_nm, w.thickness, w.unit_type, w.width, w.height, w.quantity, w.unrequested_quantity, w.requested_quantity, w.area, COALESCE(r.good_qty_sum, 0) AS good_qty_sum, COALESCE(r.defect_qty_sum, 0) AS defect_qty_sum, CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.result_count, 0) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COALESCE(r.good_qty_sum, 0) >= w.quantity THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE 'PARTIAL' END AS result_status, COALESCE(r.result_count, 0) AS result_count FROM hkgn.work_request w LEFT JOIN ( SELECT work_request_no, SUM(good_qty) AS good_qty_sum, SUM(defect_qty) AS defect_qty_sum, COUNT(*) AS result_count FROM hkgn.production_result GROUP BY work_request_no ) r ON r.work_request_no = w.request_no
WHERE w.request_date = TO_DATE(#{requestDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY w.request_date DESC, w.site_nm, w.id

SELECT pr.id, pr.production_result_no AS production_no, TO_CHAR(pr.production_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS production_date, pr.plan_no, pr.plan_line_no, pr.order_no, w.id AS work_request_id, pr.work_request_no, pr.material_cd, pr.material_nm, pr.good_qty, pr.defect_qty, pr.total_qty, pr.unit, pr.good_area, pr.defect_area, pr.total_area, pr.worker_cd, pr.defect_reason, pr.remarks FROM hkgn.production_result pr JOIN hkgn.work_request w ON w.request_no = pr.work_request_no WHERE w.id = #{workRequestId} ORDER BY pr.id DESC

SELECT id, production_result_no AS production_no, TO_CHAR(production_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS production_date, plan_no, plan_line_no, order_no, NULL AS work_request_id, work_request_no, material_cd, material_nm, good_qty, defect_qty, total_qty, unit, good_area, defect_area, total_area, worker_cd, defect_reason, remarks FROM hkgn.production_result WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE COALESCE(r.good_qty_sum, 0) >= w.quantity) AS completed_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE COALESCE(r.good_qty_sum, 0) > 0 AND COALESCE(r.good_qty_sum, 0) < w.quantity) AS partial_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE COALESCE(r.good_qty_sum, 0) = 0) AS pending_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE COALESCE(r.defect_qty_sum, 0) > 0) AS defect_count, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE COALESCE(r.good_qty_sum, 0) >= w.quantity) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) ELSE 0 END AS completion_rate FROM hkgn.work_request w LEFT JOIN ( SELECT work_request_no, SUM(good_qty) AS good_qty_sum, SUM(defect_qty) AS defect_qty_sum FROM hkgn.production_result GROUP BY work_request_no ) r ON r.work_request_no = w.request_no
WHERE w.request_date = TO_DATE(#{requestDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hkgn.production_result ( production_result_no, production_date, plan_no, plan_line_no, order_no, work_request_no, material_cd, material_nm, good_qty, defect_qty, total_qty, unit, good_area, defect_area, total_area, worker_cd, defect_reason, remarks ) VALUES ( #{productionNo}, TO_DATE(#{productionDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{planNo}, #{planLineNo}, #{orderNo}, #{workRequestNo}, #{materialCd}, #{materialNm}, #{goodQty}, #{defectQty}, #{totalQty}, #{unit}, #{goodArea}, #{defectArea}, #{totalArea}, #{workerCd}, #{defectReason}, #{remarks} )
mapper.update: UPDATE hkgn.production_result SET good_qty = #{goodQty}, defect_qty = #{defectQty}, total_qty = #{totalQty}, good_area = #{goodArea}, defect_area = #{defectArea}, total_area = #{totalArea}, defect_reason = #{defectReason}, remarks = #{remarks}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pr.good_qty), 0) AS good_qty_sum, COALESCE(SUM(pr.defect_qty), 0) AS defect_qty_sum, COUNT(*) AS result_count FROM hkgn.production_result pr JOIN hkgn.work_request w ON w.request_no = pr.work_request_no WHERE w.id = #{workRequestId}
